creator: JJaeckel@compuserve.com
text:
I realized, that you ship with your Fvwm95 port a "Linux-95" Logo for the
	Start-menu. Here is a new one with Chuck and some additional Pixmap's that
	I've created. 
	Please send me a mail if you have problems with this PR, because i couldn't 
	use the original send-pr script. (My current Internet-connection works thru
	a M$-Win... System. :-( )

How-To-Repeat: 
	--
